description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Cora Pain Grillé, a packaged toasted bread product. The front of the box features a photographic image of two slices of golden-brown toasted bread, wheat stalks, and a green label indicating the use of sunflower oil. The box is predominantly brown and yellow, with the Cora brand logo prominently displayed in red and white. Nutritional information, product weight (500g), and freshness details are printed on the sides. The packaging is sealed and appears sturdy, designed to protect the bread inside from external elements. The overall appearance is clean, commercial, and suitable for display in urban grocery stores or markets.
description: A rectangular, sealed cardboard box of Cora Pain Grillé toasted bread, featuring images of bread slices and wheat on a brown and yellow background with clear branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main branding, product name, images of toasted bread slices, wheat, and a sunflower oil label.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the Cora logo, product name, and detailed nutritional and freshness information on a yellow background.
description_view_2: The back view is visually identical to the front, repeating the branding, bread imagery, and product details.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with the Cora logo, product name, and nutritional information on a yellow panel.
attribute_crust_pattern: The bread slices depicted on the packaging have a uniform, golden-brown crust with a slightly rough, toasted texture and no visible scoring or seeds. The crust appears even and crisp, typical of pre-sliced, toasted bread.
